page_content: ECON416 Analysis of Economic Development (3 Credits) Analysis of the determinants and influences on economic development. Emphasis on both theoretical models and econometric methods of explaining why some countries are poor, along with examination of policies to promote development. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in ECON325, ECON326, and ECON422. Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Economics Bachelor of Science; Economics minor). Credit Only Granted for: ECON315 or ECON416.
